home.title: WooCommerce POS
home.subtitle: A fast point of sale for WooCommerce

roadmap.title: Roadmap
roadmap.subtitle: What we're building for WooCommerce POS

features.title: What's included in Pro?
features.subtitle: Everything in Free, plus the tools to run your whole store from the register — and priority support when you need a hand.

terminal.title: Payment Terminal Integration
terminal.description: Connect card readers and payment terminals for fast, accurate in-person payments.

stockPrice.title: Stock & Price Editing
stockPrice.description: Update stock levels, prices, and product details right from the POS — no trip to the WordPress admin.

orders.title: Order Management
orders.description: Browse order history, open past orders, and manage them without leaving the register.

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.description: Add and edit customer details at the point of sale, kept in sync with WooCommerce.

reports.title: End-of-Day Reports
reports.description: Close the register with end-of-day summaries of sales, payments, and takings.

gateways.title: Custom Payment Gateways
gateways.description: Take payments with any WooCommerce-compatible gateway, not just the built-in options.

buyBox.proof: 5,000+ 活跃商店 · 年付费用可抵扣终身版
buyBox.unavailableDescription: 价格信息当前不可用。请稍后再试。

freePlugin.question: Is the free plugin limited?
freePlugin.answer: No. The free WooCommerce POS plugin is GPL software with full point of sale features — unlimited products, orders, and customers, and no transaction fees. Pro adds the advanced tools listed above.

yearlyVsLifetime.question: What's the difference between Yearly and Lifetime?
yearlyVsLifetime.answer: The Yearly license is a one-time payment that includes updates and priority support for one year. It does not renew automatically. The Lifetime license is a one-time payment that includes updates forever.

upgrade.question: Can I upgrade from Yearly to Lifetime?
upgrade.answer: Yes! Contact our support team and we'll credit the remaining time on your Yearly license towards a Lifetime license.

siteLimits.question: How many sites can I use my license on?
siteLimits.answer: Each license can be activated on multiple sites. Check your account dashboard for activation limits.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, Amex), PayPal, and Bitcoin.
